name: labelguard
description: Evidence-first annotation QA and release gate for autonomous-driving datasets.

scripts.lint: node --check src/app.mjs && node --check src/domain.mjs && node --check src/assistant.mjs && node --check server/index.mjs && node --check server/ai.mjs && node --check server/env.mjs && node --check scripts/live-llm-smoke.mjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
